core_rule: 장소는 고정하고, 감정만 바꾼다. 등대는 의미 장치가 아니다.

scene.description: Ordinary harbor area near Hamel district in Yeosu. The harbor is already continuing normally — quietly, without attention, without anyone waiting. Cloudy or overcast, humid late afternoon or early evening. The world outside does not stop for anyone.
must_include: outdoor harbor setting with ordinary harbor residue
Sowoni seen from behind (standing, passive posture, not walking toward anything)
harbor surface reflections or wet pavement
distant ordinary harbor lights or boat outlines
overcast or cloudy sky — no dramatic clear night
open compositional space that feels unresolved, not scenic
must_NOT_include: Hamel Lighthouse as compositional center or focal point
directional light beam or beacon suggesting meaning or direction
star larger than a small continuity trace

forbidden: tourism poster or travel brochure aesthetic
symbolic lighthouse at center of frame
seated pose for Sowoni (hamel = standing outdoor)
face visible from front or side
text, letters, numbers, captions, watermarks, logos

color.sky: overcast pale gray-blue or heavy cloud cover, no dramatic blue
color.sea_harbor: muted reflective dark — not beautiful, just there
color.harbor_lights: ordinary amber or utility white, scattered, not picturesque
color.atmosphere: humid coastal gray-tone — continuity, not mood

star.policy: almost_unnoticed — star is a faint continuity trace, NOT a symbolic hope
star.size: very small — one of many light sources, not the focal point
star.position: upper peripheral — NOT centered, NOT directly above Sowoni's head
star.glow: minimal — faint warm or cool point only, no wide halo
star.rule: The star must NOT read as meaningful or symbolic. It exists as ordinary sky detail. Viewer may notice it only after extended looking. Never in hands, never a focal point.

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: shoulder-length dark hair, slim body, back view — back must be 85% visible, no facial detail
character.pose: standing passively — not walking toward anything, not gesturing, not reaching. Standing as if time has passed and she is simply still there.
character.description: Sowoni stands at the harbor edge or nearby. She is not watching for something. The harbor simply continues around her. She is present but not the emotional center — the continuing world is.
character.rule: Sowoni must be human young adult female silhouette. Back view only. No star in hands. No mascot. No emotional overacting. Standing — hamel is outdoor, not seated.

poses.confusion: Sowoni stands slightly turned, weight shifted — not sure which direction, not committed to any view. Arms at sides, head slightly lowered. The posture communicates uncertain presence, not dramatic confusion.
poses.pause: Sowoni stands very still, facing the harbor. Arms loose at sides. Head at rest level. The body is simply stopped — no intention visible. A pause in the middle of nothing in particular.
poses.calm: Sowoni stands with slight distance from the harbor edge. Arms relaxed, posture settled but not dramatic. The stillness is ordinary — the harbor has always been there, she is simply in it.
poses.curiosity: Sowoni's head is turned slightly — 20-30 degrees from straight ahead, as if something ordinary caught her attention but not urgently. Posture remains relaxed. No leaning, no reaching.
poses.fragile_hope: Sowoni stands at a slight angle to the harbor. Weight shifted to one leg. Head at a neutral level — not uplifted, not downcast. The posture reads as pause mid-movement, not decision or direction.

confusion.distance: medium close — upper body and environment visible but tightly framed
confusion.framing: slightly off-center — Sowoni not in perfect center, creating slight imbalance
confusion.angle: eye level, slight diagonal — unsettled framing without drama
confusion.exterior: Harbor surface partially visible. Sky partially visible. No clear horizon line — composition feels cut off.
confusion.note: Framing should feel like the viewer arrived mid-scene, not set up for it.

pause.distance: wide — harbor environment dominates, Sowoni is smaller presence
pause.framing: centered but environment-weighted — harbor and sky take most of the frame
pause.exterior: Harbor surface, distant boat silhouettes, sky all visible. Sowoni occupies lower 25% of frame.
pause.note: Emphasize that the harbor exists independently of Sowoni. She is inside it, not commanding it.

calm.distance: long — maximum environment, Sowoni smallest, almost peripheral
calm.framing: environment-first. Sowoni at lower edge, slightly left or right of center.
calm.angle: very slightly elevated — looking across the harbor, not at Sowoni
calm.exterior: Full harbor sweep visible. Overcast sky. Distant lights. Wet surface. Continuity is the subject.
calm.note: The scene should feel like it would exist exactly this way whether or not Sowoni is present.

curiosity.distance: medium — environment and Sowoni in balance but unresolved
curiosity.framing: Sowoni slightly left, something ordinary (harbor equipment, distant boat) visible right
curiosity.exterior: One part of the harbor fills the right portion. No obvious focal point. Multiple ordinary details co-exist.
curiosity.note: The composition should not point at anything. Curiosity without direction.

fragile_hope.distance: medium-long — Sowoni pushed toward one edge of frame
fragile_hope.framing: large open harbor space on opposite side of Sowoni. No destination visible.
fragile_hope.angle: slight downward tilt — 10 degrees — makes harbor feel close and present
fragile_hope.exterior: Open harbor on 60% of frame. Sowoni on 40%. The open space is not invitation — it is simply there.
fragile_hope.note: Absence of destination. The space is open but not inviting.

composition.core: ordinary world continuation — the harbor exists without needing anyone to witness it
composition.rule: environment precedes character. The harbor is the subject. Sowoni is inside the harbor, not commanding it.
composition.flow: harbor residue → ordinary continuation → Sowoni present inside it → continuity pressure

lighthouse_policy.rule: Lighthouse must NOT appear as compositional center or symbolic focal point. If visible at all, it is one ordinary harbor structure among others — small, unlit, background only. It does not light the frame. It does not guide anyone.
lighthouse_policy.allowed: Lighthouse as distant background object only — smaller than 5% of frame, not lit dramatically, not centered

MUST_BE_IDENTICAL_ACROSS_ALL_5_EMOTIONS: Harbor district setting — same location, same general hour
Sowoni's body type and hair — shoulder-length dark hair, slim back-view silhouette
Overcast or cloudy atmosphere — no clear night sky across variants
Ordinary harbor palette — muted, no dramatic color
Star as peripheral trace — not focal point in any variant
Lighthouse policy — suppressed in all variants equally
ONLY_THESE_MAY_VARY_BY_EMOTION: Sowoni's standing posture and body weight distribution
Camera distance and framing (see per-emotion camera)
Specific harbor detail visible (boats, equipment, surface)
NEVER_CHANGE: Star as symbolic focal point (always almost_unnoticed)
Tourism or inspirational harbor reading (always forbidden)

consistency_block: Sowoni must be the same young adult Korean woman across all 5 emotion variants.
Same shoulder-length dark hair. Same slim standing silhouette. Back view — 85%+ hidden.
Sowoni is ALWAYS standing outdoors. Never seated. This is hamel — outdoor harbor.
Back view only. Jawline and eyes must NOT be visible in any variant.
The star is a continuity trace, NOT a meaningful focal point. It should be barely noticeable.
The lighthouse is NOT a compositional element. It may exist only as background detail.
NO text, captions, subtitles, or watermarks in any generated image.
The harbor should feel like it was already there, will continue after, and does not care about Sowoni's presence.
DreamTown feeling: ordinary watercolor continuation. No drama, no inspiration, no healing.
